name: Gluten-Free Savory Granola
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, mix well all the dry ingredients (puffed rice, buckwheat flour, rolled oats, pumpkin seeds, sea salt, sugar)
Add the olive oil and maple syrup and mix well, tossing with a rubber spatula
In a separate mixing bowl with whisk attachment, whip egg whites to soft peaks, 2-3 minutes
Fold the egg whites into the dry ingredients gently, keeping everything light
The mixture should be damp, not too wet, not too dry, not crumbly
Line sheet trays with parchment. Do not push the mix into the sheet tray too firmly or it will be too hard.
The mixture should be pressed together gently and after baking, it should be able to crumble apart easily
Bake at 325F in convection or Rational until golden 15-20 min. Be sure to rotate tray to avoid spotty cooking.
Remove to cool on the rack
Break apart gently to large chunks, not broken crumbs, to store in Cambro or vacuum seal
Make sure Cambro is sealed air tight!
Label, date. Shelf life is 1 month. Make fresh regularly, weekly, in small batches!
